studio.name: Orda Games
studio.tagline: Crafting immersive worlds through story, choice, and identity.
studio.heroTitle: Stories you don’t just play — you live.
studio.heroSubtitle: We create story-driven experiences with deep worlds, meaningful choices, and unforgettable characters.
studio.description: Orda Games is an independent video game studio founded in 2026 in Redmond, Washington. We are dedicated to creating immersive, story-driven games that place players inside rich worlds filled with compelling characters, emotional narratives, and impactful decisions. Our mission is to craft experiences that stay with players long after the game is over.

values.title: Story Above All
values.text: We create games where narrative leads the experience, shaping every mechanic, world, and character.

values.title: Meaningful Gameplay
values.text: Gameplay is not separate from the story — it reinforces it. Every system exists to deepen immersion and player impact.

values.title: Deliberate Craft
values.text: We take the time to build experiences with intention, focusing on depth, cohesion, and lasting impact over rushed releases.

workflow.title: Define the world
workflow.text: We shape the setting, themes, and emotional direction before anything else.

workflow.title: Align story and gameplay
workflow.text: We design mechanics that support the narrative and make player actions feel meaningful.

workflow.title: Build and refine
workflow.text: We iterate on the experience, improving pacing, systems, and immersion.

workflow.title: Polish with purpose
workflow.text: We finalize every detail to deliver a cohesive and memorable experience.

games.name: Unsworn
games.tagline: A dark fantasy RPG about loyalty, truth, and the price of peace.
games.shortDescription: A narrative-driven RPG where a fallen knight uncovers a truth that could shatter the kingdom he once served.
games.description: Unsworn is a dark fantasy narrative RPG centered on loyalty, truth, and sacrifice. When Princess Eliria vanishes during a mysterious comet night, royal knight Reynar is accused of her disappearance and hunted by the very kingdom he once swore to protect. As he searches for her, he uncovers an ancient pact between the crown and a force known as the Void — a law that sustains peace by taking away what people love most. Branded a traitor, Reynar must decide whether to preserve a fragile world built on loss… or break the system holding it together.

news.title: Unsworn officially revealed
news.summary: Orda Games announces Unsworn, a dark fantasy narrative RPG focused on loyalty, truth, and the cost of peace.

news.title: Core narrative direction finalized
news.summary: The main story arc of Unsworn has been established, defining its themes, characters, and key player decisions.

news.title: Early gameplay systems in progress
news.summary: Initial gameplay systems are now in development, focusing on third-person exploration and narrative-driven interactions.

news.title: Worldbuilding foundation completed
news.summary: The core lore of Unsworn, including the kingdom, the Void, and its underlying rules, has been defined.

milestones.title: Studio founded
milestones.text: Orda Games is established in Redmond, Washington, with a focus on narrative-driven game development.

milestones.title: Unsworn announced
milestones.text: The studio reveals its first project, introducing a dark fantasy world shaped by choice and consequence.

milestones.title: Full production
milestones.text: Unsworn enters active development, combining narrative design, gameplay systems, and worldbuilding.

milestones.title: First release
milestones.text: Unsworn is prepared for launch as the studio’s debut title.

staff.name: Damir Anvarbek
staff.bio: Drives the vision and development of Orda Games, overseeing narrative direction, gameplay systems, and the overall production of Unsworn.

faq.question: What is Orda Games?
faq.answer: Orda Games is an independent game studio focused on creating story-driven experiences with strong narrative and immersive worlds.

faq.question: What is Unsworn?
faq.answer: Unsworn is a dark fantasy narrative RPG centered on loyalty, truth, and the cost of peace.

faq.question: When will Unsworn be released?
faq.answer: Unsworn is currently in development and is planned for release in September 2026.

faq.question: Are you open to collaborations or business inquiries?
faq.answer: Yes. Orda Games is open to business, press, and collaboration opportunities.

faq.question: How can I contact the studio?
faq.answer: You can reach Orda Games via email for all inquiries, including partnerships and press.

contact.altText: For business, press, and collaboration inquiries.
